# d9240095-6ecf-42f8-b6d9-122c63ef50bd — Auto-Generated Playwright Tests

Generated by [TestQ](https://testq.ai). Do not edit manually — changes will be overwritten on next push.

## Prerequisites
- Node.js 18+
- A running instance of the application under test

## Setup

```bash
npm install
npx playwright install
```

## Run Tests

```bash
# Run all tests headless
npm test

# Run with browser visible
npm run test:headed

# Open Playwright UI mode
npm run test:ui

# View HTML report
npm run test:report
```

## Environment Variables

| Variable   | Description              | Default                 |
|------------|--------------------------|-------------------------|
| BASE_URL   | Application base URL     | http://localhost:3000   |
| CI         | Enable CI retry settings | —                       |

## Structure

```
tests/
  {pbi-id}/               ← specs grouped by PBI
    {scenario}.spec.ts    ← one spec per scenario
fixtures/
  {pbi-id}.selectors.ts   ← selectors shared across all scenarios of a PBI
pages/
  {pbi-id}.page.ts        ← page objects shared across all scenarios of a PBI
  index.ts                ← barrel export for all page objects
utils/
  helpers.ts              ← shared utilities
package.json
playwright.config.ts
```
